title: Random Potion Effect
description: Give you all x minuted a random Potion effect. You can manually setup the time.
body:
## Random Potion Effect

### Functions

This _mod_ makes you get a **random** potion effect every **x** minutes. You can **set** and **change** the time with 

<details>
<summary>/SetTimeInterval (time)</summary>
Changes the time it takes for the player to get a new random effet.
The time must be greater than 0.0 and less than or equal to 60.
</details>

and with 

<details>
<summary>/randomeffect</summary>
Gives the player executing the command a random effect.
</details>


to manually give a **random** effect. Effects that you get but **already** have will be a **higher** level.

<details>
<summary>Effects that are possible to get</summary>

- Absorption
- Bad Omen
- Blindness
- Conduit Power
- Dolphins Grace
- Darkness
- Fire Resistance
- Feather Falling
- Health Boost
- Hero of the Village
- Hunger
- Infested
- Instant Damage
- Instant Health
- Jump Boost
- Mining Fatigue
- Nausea
- Poison
- Resistance
- Raid Omen
- Slowness
- Speed
- Strength
- Saturation
- Weakness
- Windcharged

informations comming soon


</details>

If any effet is missing [**join our discord server**]([https://discord.gg/EynG7Tkcwe](https://discord.gg/EynG7Tkcwe)) and report that.

### Support and Suggestions

If you have any questions or suggestions [**join our discord server**](https://discord.gg/EynG7Tkcwe) and feel free to ask!

### Credits

<details>
<summary>Idea</summary>
  
This mod was originally made for [BrostasticTV](https://www.twitch.tv/brostastictv)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Team</summary>

**I would be delighted to receive feedback. Special thanks to [siegero10](https://modrinth.com/user/siegero10)
because he designed the cover picture of this mod for me and I'm looking forward to working with him on further modifications of mine.**


The mod is programmed with love by [Jari_](https://modrinth.com/user/Jari_) and is my first mod that I have published on Modrinth :)
The Mod Icon was made by [siegero10](https://modrinth.com/user/siegero10).
